intended_use: MeVis Liver Suite is an image analysis software and intended to be used for visualization of hepatic imaging studies derived from CT and MR scanning devices (image source: single- and multiframe DICOM
intended_use_full: MeVis Liver Suite is an image analysis software and intended to be used for visualization of hepatic imaging studies derived from CT and MR scanning devices (image source: single- and multiframe DICOM). MeVis Liver Suite supports physicians in their workflow for evaluating the liver, related vascular anatomy, and the volume of liver and liver vascular territories for treatment planning, preoperative evaluation of surgery strategies, and post-procedure or therapy follow-up assessment of the hepatic system and related vascular structures.
target_condition: oncologic liver disease and hepatic donor/transplant evaluation
